expo.name: mobile
expo.//scheme: Deep-link / URL scheme Expo Router requires. Rename to your app's real scheme before shipping.

ios.//bundleIdentifier: Replace with your real reverse-DNS bundle id before an iOS build.

android.//package: Replace with your real reverse-DNS package name before an Android build.

expo.//plugins: expo-router is required for file-based routing; expo-secure-store needs no config plugin.
